LargeTreeMonitoring 0.1.0
  • Reference

Copy time-series attributes to new values

ltm_copy_ts.Rd

Builds a new stats::ts() object with the same start, end, and frequency as an existing ts object, replacing only the observed values.

Usage

ltm_copy_ts(ts_to_copy, values)

Arguments

ts_to_copy

A base R ts object whose time attributes are copied.

values

Vector of replacement values. Its length must equal length(ts_to_copy).

Value

A ts object containing values and the time attributes of ts_to_copy.

See also

Other time-series conversion helpers: ltm_days_between(), ltm_spidf_to_ts(), ltm_spidf_to_zoo()
